My Garden

Wikilinks

Link to another note by writing its title in double brackets: [[Backlinks]]. mug resolves the link by matching the title against your notes, the same way Obsidian does. Give the link different display text with a pipe: [[Backlinks|see what links here]].

A link to a note that doesn't exist yet renders as plain, muted text — a gentle prompt to write it later.

Linked references
